meaning: n.超凡魅力,感召力,教皇般的指导力
examples: He was elected to power on the strength of his charisma.
He has neither the policies nor the personal charisma to inspire people.
Except for a patina of charisma, he was like a thousand other bright young men in Toronto.
Here, as elsewhere, recently promoted principal dancer Chase Finlay shone with ever-increasing maturity and charisma.
But not least among his more amazing powers has been a superhuman charisma and ever-enduring appeal.
